name: win32-mcp-inspector
description: Enterprise-grade Windows automation MCP server with 53 tools — click_text, wait_for_text, structured OCR, UI Automation, and more

win32-mcp.enabled.description: Enable Windows Automation Inspector MCP server

win32-mcp.autoInstall.description: Prompt to install pinned win32-mcp-server from PyPI if not found

win32-mcp.tesseractPath.description: Custom path to Tesseract OCR executable. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_TESSERACT_PATH.

win32-mcp.ocrLanguage.description: Default OCR language. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_OCR_LANGUAGE.

win32-mcp.ocrPreprocess.description: Default OCR preprocessing mode. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_OCR_PREPROCESS.

win32-mcp.screenshotFormat.description: Default screenshot output format. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_CAPTURE_FORMAT.

win32-mcp.screenshotQuality.description: JPEG/WebP quality (1-100). For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_CAPTURE_QUALITY.

win32-mcp.screenshotScale.description: Screenshot scale factor (0.1-1.0). For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_CAPTURE_SCALE.

win32-mcp.coordinateValidation.description: Validate click/move coordinates are within monitor bounds. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_COORDINATE_VALIDATION.

win32-mcp.debugLogging.description: Enable verbose debug logging. For MCP clients, set WIN32_MCP_DEBUG_LOGGING.
